description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white horizontal stripes encircling its body, which are likely reflective for visibility in low light. The surface shows signs of dirt and wear, especially near the base and along the cone, indicating outdoor use. The base is black, flat, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping, with some scuff marks and a slightly textured finish. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side.
description: A tall orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, black, square base showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and visible dirt marks, especially on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view with the cone's surface appearing cleaner, and the white stripes more evenly visible.
description_view_2: Another side view with minor scuffing on the base and a clear view of the cone's lower white stripe.
description_view_3: Rear view with the most visible dirt and wear on the cone's surface, especially along the right side.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal, white reflective stripes encircle the cone, evenly spaced along the upper and middle sections.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, flat, and black, appearing thick and stable with visible scuff marks and a slightly textured surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: The object appears worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and dirt accumulation, especially near the base and along the cone.
